## Health and Biosciences: Targeted Regulatory Review – Forward regulatory plans
- Latest updates – Health and bioscience review
- Program and policy initiatives and novel regulatory approaches
- Forward regulatory plans
Published: January 2021 Last update: January 2021
Through the regulatory reviews, departments and agencies identified actions that involved making changes to regulations. For more details on planned regulatory changes associated with the roadmap, visit the following regulatory plan:
- Overview: Health Canada’s forward regulatory plan
For more departments’ and agencies’ forward regulatory plans, visit the Government-wide forward regulatory plans.
